overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character wearing a traditional straw hat and cloak, standing on a wooden temple balcony overlooking a dramatic stormy landscape with a distant castle fortress and autumn-colored forests.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden temple balcony overlooking stormy valley

events.description: character turns head to the left to survey the landscape, then returns to forward facing

agents.ego_description: Samurai character wearing a traditional straw kasa hat and dark cloak, standing still on the balcony and gazing contemplatively at the distant castle and stormy landscape, occasionally shifting weight and turning head

entered.detail: Dark wooden roof structure with overhanging eaves providing shelter
Thick dark wooden structural pillar supporting the temple roof
Low wooden railing along the edge of the balcony platform
Japanese castle or fortress structure perched atop a distant forested hill
Dark dramatic storm clouds with greenish tint covering the sky
Dense forest canopy with mix of green and golden yellow autumn foliage covering the valley

segments.scene_description: The samurai stands on a wooden temple balcony under a dark stormy sky, sheltered by the overhanging roof. The character gazes out at a distant castle fortress perched on a hill amidst dense autumn forests. The scene is still and contemplative, with only subtle breathing movements and a brief head turn to survey the landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a contemplative moment on a wooden temple balcony that overlooks a vast, stormy autumn landscape. It begins with the samurai standing sheltered under the overhanging roof, gazing out toward a distant castle fortress perched atop a hill. As the camera lingers, the stillness of the scene is punctuated only by the character's subtle breathing and a slow, surveying turn of the head. The view then expands to emphasize the contrast between the dark, brooding sky and the vibrant colors of the dense forests below.
